**What needs to be improved?**

Describe which feature needs to be improved.

**How it actually works?**

Describe how this feature works actually.

**How it should work?**

Describe how this feature should work if these improvements are applied.

**Additional context**

Add any other context or screenshots about the feature request here.

**Verification points**

Add a list of things that should be checked when enhancing this feature.
